name: cleanup-bash-cmds
description: Parses Bash commands with shfmt's syntax tree: denies heredocs, strips 2>/dev/null everywhere plus trailing | head / | tail / | grep / || true / 2>&1 from the final statement only, rewrites a final trailing > file into | tee file, caps every sleep at 3 seconds, replaces constant narration echoes with a system-message nag, ensures set -o pipefail, and never emits a rewrite that lost a statement
